data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) Both commits live on main — merge commit 13ebc43e8acb and submit-recovery fix 013f50865076. (2) CI green (run 23091381635, conclusion: success). (3) Typecheck clean, all 4 component tests pass. (4) handleSubmit uses try/catch/finally to prevent button stuck in loading state; launchHistoryDebugSession wraps startSession in try/catch — review note from implementation_review fully addressed. (5) No invariant violations. Approved for shipped.
